omitted_declarations.policy_reference: This app uses Google AdMob for advertising. AdMob may collect and use certain data for advertising purposes, as described in Google's Privacy Policy. This may include device information, location data, and other information to serve personalized ads. Users can manage their ad preferences through their device's settings.

This app uses Google Analytics for Firebase to collect anonymous usage data to help improve the app. This may include information about how the app is used, such as features accessed and session duration. This data is aggregated and does not personally identify any user.

I want to inform you that whenever you use my Service, in a case of an error in the app I collect data and information (through third party products) on your phone called Log Data. This Log Data may include information such as your device Internet Protocol (“IP”) address, device name, operating system version, the configuration of the app when utilizing my Service, the time and date of your use of the Service, and other statistics.
